name: AmeriGas
notes: Strategy: Scraped https://www.amerigas.com/locations/propane-offices/{state} directory pages. Found state index page listing all 47 states with ~450 branch offices. Extracted full street addresses + city + state for each branch. Note: these are 'local office' branches (delivery depots), not tank exchange retail points (~50,000). Sources: amerigas.com sitemap.xml + state directory pages. ND/SD/ME/RI pages only showed one location each despite headers suggesting more. Michigan Alpena location has no street address on site.

locations_found.name: AmeriGas - Robstown
